response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-01:26: Intro speech segment, no singing. 2. 01:26: The song 'Yakusoku' (Promise) begins. On-screen text indicates 'Lyrics, Music: Eve'. 3. Search query used: '約束 Eve 歌詞' (Yakusoku Eve lyrics). 4. Found official lyrics for 'Yakusoku' by Eve, which matches the song title and composer credit seen on-screen. 5. Mapped performance from 01:26 to 04:59 as a vocal music scene. 6. 04:59-05:00: Final outro segment.
response.global_summary: The video is a 3D performance segment featuring Hololive VTubers Raora Panthera and Ninomae Ina'nis performing the song 'Yakusoku' (Promise). The song has a melancholic yet hopeful theme, with lyrics reflecting on memories and the promise to meet again. The segment includes a brief intro, the full musical performance, and an outro.

scenes.description: Introductory segment before the song performance. The VTubers are speaking, likely setting the stage for the song.
The song 'Yakusoku' begins, performed by Raora Panthera and Ninomae Ina'nis. The on-screen text identifies 'Lyrics, Music: Eve'. The VTubers perform a 3D dance and vocal performance of the song.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
久しぶりにさ 夢を見たんだ
月が綺麗な夜に

長袖のシャツに 覚えがある道
少し寂しそうに見えた
胸が苦しくなるけど暖かい
気づいた冬の朝だ

約束するよ
近くにいるから見えないものほど
大事にするよ
言葉にできないんだけどね

いつもと同じ景色が少し
違って見えた気がして
ぼんやりに浮かぶ君の笑顔が
足取りを軽くさせる

長い髪の毛を
なびかせる風は
心の奥を揺らす
まだ見たことない顔があるんだな
気づいた寒空の下

感じているよ
当たり前のことほど大切だよ
思い出すよ
かけがえのない日々のこと

約束するよ
近くにいるから見えないものほど
大事にするよ
言葉にできないんだけどね

Ohh, ずっと大切だよ
この気持ちを育てていたい
そばにいるよ
笑う顔も怒る顔も
全部近くで見てたいな
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I had a dream after a long time
On a night with a beautiful moon
Waving goodbye saying 'See you tomorrow'
I regret that your figure remains

A familiar road in a long-sleeved shirt
You seemed a little lonely
My chest tightens but it's warm
I realized it's a winter morning

I promise
I'll cherish the things I can't see because they're close
I'll take care of them
Even though I can't put it into words

The usual scenery seemed
A little different
Your smile floating vaguely
Lightens my steps

The wind blowing your long hair
Stirs the depths of my heart
I noticed there's a face I haven't seen before
Under the cold sky

I feel it
The most ordinary things are the most important
I remember
The irreplaceable days

I promise
I'll cherish the things I can't see because they're close
I'll take care of them
Even though I can't put it into words

Ohh, it's always important
I want to nurture this feeling
I'm by your side
I want to see your smiling face and your angry face
I want to see everything up close
